Bash(cd F:/Financial_Asset_QA_System_cyx-master/backend && python -c "
import sys
import asyncio
import time
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

async def test_retrieval_quality\(\):
    from app.rag.hybrid_pipeline import HybridRAGPipeline
    
    pipeline = HybridRAGPipeline\(\)
    
    queries = [
        '什么是市盈率',
        '收入和净利润的区别是什么',
        '什么是可转债的强赎条款'
    ]
    
    for query in queries:
        print\('\\n' + '='*80\)
        print\(f'Query: {query}'\)
        print\('='*80\)
        
        start_time = time.time\(\)
        result = await pipeline.search\(query, use_hybrid=True\)
        elapsed = time.time\(\) - start_time
        
        print\(f'检索耗时: {elapsed:.3f}秒'\)
        print\(f'Total found: {result.total_found}'\)
        print\(f'Documents returned: {len\(result.documents\)}'\)
        
        for i, doc in enumerate\(result.documents, 1\):
            print\(f'\\n--- Document {i} ---'\)
            print\(f'Source: {doc.source}'\)
            print\(f'Score: {doc.score:.4f}'\)
            print\(f'Content \({len\(doc.content\)} chars\):'\)
            print\(doc.content\)
            print\(\)

asyncio.run\(test_retrieval_quality\(\)\)
" 2>&1 | head -200)

Bash(cd /f/Financial_Asset_QA_System_cyx-master/backend && python -c "
import asyncio
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from app.agent.core import AgentCore

async def test\(\):
    agent = AgentCore\(\)
    result = await agent.run\('什么是市盈率'\)
    
    print\('=== RESULT ==='\)
    print\(f'Text length: {len\(result.text\)}'\)
    print\(f'Number of blocks: {len\(result.blocks\)}'\)
    print\(\)
    
    for i, block in enumerate\(result.blocks\):
        print\(f'Block {i+1}: type={block.type}, title={block.title}'\)
        if block.type == 'analysis':
            print\(f'  Analysis text preview: {str\(block.data.get\(\\"text\\", \\"\\"\)\)[:150]}...'\)
    
asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
")

Bash(cd F:/Financial_Asset_QA_System_cyx-master/backend && python -c "
from app.agent.core import AgentCore
import asyncio

async def test\(\):
    agent = AgentCore\(\)
    query = '阿里巴巴当前股价是多少？'
    count = 0
    async for event in agent.run\(query\):
        count += 1
        print\(f'Event {count}: type={event.type}'\)
        if event.type == 'analysis_chunk':
            print\(f'  Chunk: {event.text[:50] if event.text else None}...'\)
        if count > 20:
            break

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1 | head -50)
